compatibility.notes: Built from the locked dev commit and not yet verified against the deleted official v1.2.2 binary.

notes: Adds patch metadata, persistent custom base names, read-only base storage, guild, worker, and feed-box browsers, plus save-source-scoped player notes; configurable service endpoints and public remote Mod ZIP imports accept HTTP or HTTPS while retaining URL, credential, redirect, and public-address validation. No Palworld save files are modified.
